'''Chandaar''' was the throneworld of the [[Kingdom of Cron]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]], it had been [[Battle of Chandaar|conquered]] by Xim's [[Xer VIII|father]]. Many years later, it became [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was the headquarters of numerous [[Cronese]] mining companies. It was known as the "Jewel of the Tion", but by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Cronese Kings were mere figureheads and the planet was a polluted urban world, covered with both decaying cities and ancient ruins.

[[Ambaril]] was a [[City/Legends|city]] on Chandaar.
